headline: Goldman Sachs Sees S&P 500 at 8000 Year-End: 5 of Its Top Picks Pay Big Passive Income Dividends
summary: Goldman Sachs is a leading investment firm on Wall Street and worldwide. The firm’s top-tier research department continues to provide institutional and high-net-worth clients with the best ideas across the investment spectrum and is likely to do so for years to come. headline: Citizens Financial Group and NBT Bancorp Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after the broader financial sector rallied sharply, lifting regional bank names alongside their larger peers.
